entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, a non-profit organization conducting agricultural research for development

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where ICRISAT conducts agricultural research for development

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region where ICRISAT conducts agricultural research for development

entities.name: DRYLAND AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A farming method designed for regions of scant rainfall, focusing on water-retentive tillage and suitable crop selection

entities.name: WATER-RETENTIVE TILLAGE METHODS
entities.description: Tillage techniques used in dryland agriculture to retain water

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Plants grown for food or other purposes, targeted for improvement by ICRISAT

entities.name: DROUGHT CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental state characterized by scant rainfall

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of genomes used to leverage scientific innovations in crop development

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: A method using genomics to develop sustainable and hardier crop varieties

entities.name: POVERTY AND HUNGER
entities.description: Socio-economic conditions affecting more than 25% of the population in Asia and sub-Saharan Africa
